title: Oaks advance to final
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Old Oaks men's hockey...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Old Oaks men's hockey team advanced to the Eden Hockey League final this past weekend, after beating Nelson Mandela University (NMU) 4-2 at the Oakhill Sports Campus.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Old Oaks men's hockey team advanced to the Eden Hockey League final this past weekend, after beating Nelson Mandela University (NMU) 4-2 at the Oakhill Sports Campus."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"These two teams previously locked horns in the pool games a few weeks ago, with Oaks thrashing NMU by six goals to two."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This time around though, NMU played with more resilience and resistance until the end.","html":"This time around though, NMU played with more resilience and resistance until the end."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the first quarter Oaks started off brightly through a field goal from Shaun Mackenzie, and then went into a 2-0 lead in the second quarter via a strike from Zack Omar.","html":"In the first quarter Oaks started off brightly through a field goal from Shaun Mackenzie, and then went into a 2-0 lead in the second quarter via a strike from Zack Omar."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jaques Potgieter extended the home team's lead with another goal before NMU opened their account.","html":"Jaques Potgieter extended the home team's lead with another goal before NMU opened their account."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the final 10 minutes Kyle Groom from Oaks drove his side's final goal into the back of the net.","html":"In the final 10 minutes Kyle Groom from Oaks drove his side's final goal into the back of the net."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"NMU refused to hoist the white flag, and through persistent play, were rewarded with a consolation goal to end proceedings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oaks will now play an equally formidable Crusaders side from George in their own back yard this weekend.","html":"Oaks will now play an equally formidable Crusaders side from George in their own back yard this weekend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It is also worth mentioning that this is the first time in three years that Oaks have made the final; so lots of bragging rights are up for grabs.","html":"It is also worth mentioning that this is the first time in three years that Oaks have made the final; so lots of bragging rights are up for grabs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The match will start at 17:30 in George on Saturday 3 August.","html":"The match will start at 17:30 in George on Saturday 3 August."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Old Oaks ladies","html":"Old Oaks ladies"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Old Oaks ladies lost against York in a penalty shoot-out, losing in the end by three goals to two. The full-time score was 2-2, indicating how evenly matched the teams were.","html":"Old Oaks ladies lost against York in a penalty shoot-out, losing in the end by three goals to two. The full-time score was 2-2, indicating how evenly matched the teams were."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The York ladies will now play the Crusaders in the final - also in George on Saturday.","html":"The York ladies will now play the Crusaders in the final - also in George on Saturday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Coach Nigel Leverton said that he is fairly satisfied with Oaks ladies' performance this season given that they only finished in fifth place last year.","html":"Coach Nigel Leverton said that he is fairly satisfied with Oaks ladies' performance this season given that they only finished in fifth place last year."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"This time around we are playing for the third and fourth play-off spot. In the pool games we managed to beat York, but unfortunately couldn't repeat it in the knockouts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"However, there are a lot of positives we can take out of the game, and we are looking forward to the weekend's game against Plett at the Oakhill Sports Campus.","html":"\"However, there are a lot of positives we can take out of the game, and we are looking forward to the weekend's game against Plett at the Oakhill Sports Campus."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We would love to end the season off on a high,\" he said.","html":"\"We would love to end the season off on a high,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
